summary: Comprehensive testing of ACA Compliance Workflow feature (iteration 4). All backend API tests passed (18/18). Frontend UI tests passed for workflow page, navigation, step execution, and registration flow.
passed_tests: User login with test_wf@test.com credentials
User registration flow (new employer user)
Employer selector in sidebar showing 'Acme Corp'
Navigation to Compliance Workflow via sidebar nav item
Workflow page displays all 13 steps with correct names and statuses
Progress bar shows correct count (e.g., 2/13 steps at 15%)
Individual step 'Run' buttons execute and expand results
'Run Full Check' button calls POST /api/workflow/{employer_id}/run-all
Step results show correct data (onboarding shows Company: Acme Corp, EIN: 12-3456789, Payroll: ADP, Data Connected: Yes)
Employee Profiles step shows counts (Total Employees: 0, With Hours Data: 0, With Coverage: 0)
FTE Calculation step shows Full-Time, Part-Time, FTE Equivalent, Total FTE counts
ALE Determination shows Decision badge and 'Not an ALE - ACA employer mandate does not apply' message
Decision badges displayed on steps (ALE, MEC, MV, Affordability)
'Open Tool' buttons navigate to correct pages (/employees, /ale, /mec)
Dashboard shows 'Guided Compliance Workflow' CTA card with 'Start Workflow' button
Dashboard 'Quick Actions' includes 'Compliance Workflow' button
'Refresh' button on workflow page works (shows 'Workflow refreshed' toast)
Backend API: GET /api/workflow/{employer_id} returns workflow state
Backend API: POST /api/workflow/{employer_id}/execute/{step_id} executes individual steps
Backend API: POST /api/workflow/{employer_id}/run-all runs all steps in sequence
All 13 workflow steps have correct step_id, name, description, and type attributes

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all workflow UI components and integrations working)

seed_data_creation: Existing employer 'Acme Corp' used for testing. New test user registered during frontend tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Workflow feature fully tested and working. All 13 compliance steps execute correctly via API. For employers with 0 employees, workflow shows 'Needs Action' status on employee-dependent steps. The test user test_wf@test.com has employer 'Acme Corp' selected. The workflow state persists between sessions. Decision steps (ALE, MEC, MV, Affordability) show 'Decision' badge. Conditional step (Actuarial Certification) is available but marked with '?' indicator.
